sentences.sentence: "I am from a large, poor family and for many years we have done without breakfast.
sentences.translation: “我来自一个贫困的大家庭，多年来我们一直没有早餐吃。

structure.text: am from a large, poor family

difficult_points: 开头引号表明这是项目参与者的直接引语。
do without 表示“没有……也将就”，这里指长期不吃早餐。
and 连接个人家庭背景与多年生活困境两个信息。

sentences.sentence: Ever since I joined the Street Kids International Program I have been able to buy my family sugar and buns for breakfast.
sentences.translation: 自从我加入 Street Kids International 项目以来，我已经能够给家人买糖和小面包当早餐。

structure.text: Ever since I joined the Street Kids International Program

difficult_points: Ever since 引导时间状语从句，强调从加入项目以后一直持续到现在。
have been able to 使用现在完成时，说明能力或条件已经发生改变。
buy my family sugar and buns 是双宾语结构，my family 是受益对象。

sentences.sentence: I have also bought myself decent second-hand clothes and shoes." - Doreen Soko
sentences.translation: 我还给自己买了体面的二手衣服和鞋子。”——Doreen Soko

structure.text: myself decent second-hand clothes and shoes

difficult_points: also 表示除了为家人买早餐之外，还有额外的个人改善。
decent second-hand clothes and shoes 中 decent 修饰二手衣鞋的质量或体面程度。
破折号后的姓名是引语说话人的署名。

sentences.sentence: "We have had business experience.
sentences.translation: “我们已经有了经商经验。
difficult_points: 开头引号说明这是另一位参与者的直接引语。
have had 使用现在完成时，强调经验已经获得并与现在相关。
business experience 是名词短语，指实际经营方面的经历。

sentences.sentence: Now I am confident to expand what we have been doing.
sentences.translation: 现在我有信心扩大我们一直在做的事情。

structure.text: to expand what we have been doing

difficult_points: Now 与前一句形成时间对比，强调项目带来的当前信心。
confident to expand 表示有信心去扩大已有业务。
what we have been doing 是宾语从句，指他们一直经营的事情。

expressions.text: expand what we have been doing
expressions.meaning_zh: 扩大我们一直在做的事

sentences.sentence: I have learnt cash management and the way of keeping money so we save for reinvestment.
sentences.translation: 我学会了现金管理和保管资金的方法，因此我们会为再投资而储蓄。

structure.text: cash management and the way of keeping money

difficult_points: cash management and the way of keeping money 是并列宾语，说明学到的两类技能。
so 引导结果分句，说明学会理财后产生的行为变化。
reinvestment 指把赚到的钱再次投入业务，而不是立即消费。

sentences.sentence: Now business is a part of our lives.
sentences.translation: 现在，生意已经成为我们生活的一部分。
difficult_points: Now 再次强调项目后生活状态的改变。
business 作不可数名词，泛指经商活动。
a part of our lives 表示经商已经融入日常生活。

sentences.sentence: As well, we did not know each other before - now we have made new friends." - Fan Kaoma
sentences.translation: 此外，我们以前彼此并不认识——现在我们结交了新朋友。”——Fan Kaoma

structure.text: we did not know each other before
now we have made new friends

difficult_points: As well 表示补充一个额外好处。
破折号连接过去和现在，形成“以前不认识—现在成为朋友”的对比。
have made new friends 使用现在完成时，强调关系已经建立。

sentences.sentence: Participants in the Youth Skill Enterprise Initiative Program, Zambia
sentences.translation: 赞比亚 Youth Skill Enterprise Initiative Program 的参与者

structure.text: in the Youth Skill Enterprise Initiative Program, Zambia

difficult_points: 这是引语来源说明，不是完整谓语句。
in 后面的项目名称和国家说明参与者所属项目与地点。

sentences.sentence: Introduction
sentences.translation: 引言
difficult_points: 这是章节标题，用来引出文章的背景与目的。
标题没有谓语动词，因此按标题性名词处理。

sentences.sentence: Although small-scale business training and credit programs have become more common throughout the world, relatively little attention has been paid to the need to direct such opportunities to young people.
sentences.translation: 虽然小规模商业培训和信贷项目在世界各地变得更加常见，但人们相对很少关注需要把这类机会导向年轻人。

structure.text: Although small-scale business training and credit programs have become more common throughout the world
small-scale business training and credit programs
relatively little attention has been paid
to the need to direct such opportunities to young people

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，后半句才是作者强调的重点。
relatively little attention has been paid 是被动结构，表示关注不足。
to direct such opportunities to young people 中 such opportunities 指前面的培训和信贷项目。

sentences.sentence: Even less attention has been paid to children living on the street or in difficult circumstances.
sentences.translation: 而对于流落街头或处境困难的儿童，人们给予的关注就更少了。

structure.text: to children living on the street or in difficult circumstances
living on the street or in difficult circumstances

difficult_points: Even less 与上一句的 relatively little 递进，表示关注程度更低。
living on the street or in difficult circumstances 是现在分词短语，修饰 children。
on the street 和 in difficult circumstances 是并列处境。

sentences.sentence: Over the past nine years, Street Kids International (S.K.I.) has been working with partner organisations in Africa, Latin America and India to support the economic lives of street children.
sentences.translation: 在过去九年里，Street Kids International（S.K.I.）一直与非洲、拉丁美洲和印度的合作组织合作，支持街头儿童的经济生活。

structure.text: with partner organisations in Africa, Latin America and India
to support the economic lives of street children

difficult_points: Over the past nine years 与现在完成进行时连用，强调持续合作。
has been working 表示从过去持续到现在的工作。
to support ... 是目的不定式，说明合作的目标。

sentences.sentence: The purpose of this paper is to share some of the lessons S.K.I. and our partners have learned.
sentences.translation: 本文的目的是分享 S.K.I. 及其合作伙伴学到的一些经验教训。

structure.text: to share some of the lessons S.K.I. and our partners have learned
S.K.I. and our partners have learned

difficult_points: 主干是 The purpose ... is ...，后面用不定式说明目的。
lessons 在这里指实践中总结出的经验教训。
S.K.I. and our partners have learned 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 lessons。

sentences.sentence: Background
sentences.translation: 背景
difficult_points: 这是章节标题，提示接下来介绍街头儿童问题的背景。
标题为单个名词，没有完整主谓结构。

sentences.sentence: Typically, children do not end up on the streets due to a single cause, but to a combination of factors: a dearth of adequately funded schools, the demand for income at home, family breakdown and violence.
sentences.translation: 通常，儿童最终流落街头并不是因为单一原因，而是多种因素共同作用：资金充足的学校不足、家庭需要收入、家庭破裂以及暴力。

structure.text: due to a single cause, but to a combination of factors
a dearth of adequately funded schools, the demand for income at home, family breakdown and violence

difficult_points: not ... but ... 强调原因不是单一因素，而是多因素组合。
end up on the streets 表示最终流落街头。
冒号后的并列名词短语具体列出这些因素。
a dearth of adequately funded schools 指资金充足学校的缺乏。

sentences.sentence: The street may be attractive to children as a place to find adventurous play and money.
sentences.translation: 街头可能会吸引儿童，因为那里像是一个可以寻找冒险游戏和钱的地方。

structure.text: as a place to find adventurous play and money
to find adventurous play and money

difficult_points: may be 表示可能性，作者不是绝对判断。
attractive to children 中 to 表示吸引的对象。
as a place ... 说明街头为何对儿童有吸引力。

sentences.sentence: However, it is also a place where some children are exposed, with little or no protection, to exploitative employment, urban crime, and abuse.
sentences.translation: 然而，街头也是一个地方，在那里一些儿童在几乎没有保护的情况下，会暴露于剥削性工作、城市犯罪和虐待之中。

structure.text: where some children are exposed, with little or no protection, to exploitative employment, urban crime, and abuse
to exploitative employment, urban crime, and abuse

difficult_points: However 与前一句街头的吸引力形成转折。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 place。
are exposed to 表示“暴露于、遭受”，to 后列出三种危险。
with little or no protection 是插入成分，说明儿童缺少保护。

sentences.sentence: Children who work on the streets are generally involved in unskilled, labour-intensive tasks which require long hours, such as shining shoes, carrying goods, guarding or washing cars, and informal trading.
sentences.translation: 在街头工作的儿童通常从事不需要技能但劳动密集的任务，这些任务需要长时间工作，例如擦鞋、搬运货物、看守或清洗汽车，以及非正式交易。

structure.text: Children who work on the streets
in unskilled, labour-intensive tasks which require long hours
such as shining shoes, carrying goods, guarding or washing cars, and informal trading

difficult_points: who work on the streets 修饰 Children，限定儿童群体。
be involved in 表示“参与、从事”。
which require long hours 修饰 tasks，说明这些工作的耗时特点。
such as 后列举具体街头工作类型。

sentences.sentence: Some may also earn income through begging, or through theft and illegal activities.
sentences.translation: 一些儿童也可能通过乞讨，或通过盗窃和非法活动来获得收入。

structure.text: through begging, or through theft and illegal activities

difficult_points: Some 指代上一句中的部分街头儿童。
may 表示可能性，不是所有儿童都如此。
through 引出获得收入的方式，后面并列两个渠道。

sentences.sentence: At the same time, there are street children who take pride in supporting themselves and their families and who often enjoy their work.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，也有一些街头儿童为养活自己和家人而感到自豪，并且常常喜欢自己的工作。

structure.text: who take pride in supporting themselves and their families

difficult_points: At the same time 用来平衡前文对危险和非法活动的描述。
there are 是存在句，street children 是主要信息。
两个 who 从句并列修饰 street children。
take pride in 后接动名词 supporting，表示以养活自己和家人为傲。

sentences.sentence: Many children may choose entrepreneurship because it allows them a degree of independence, is less exploitative than many forms of paid employment, and is flexible enough to allow them to participate in other activities such as education and domestic tasks.
sentences.translation: 许多儿童可能会选择创业，因为它能给他们一定程度的独立性，比许多有偿雇佣形式剥削性更低，并且足够灵活，使他们能够参加教育和家务等其他活动。

structure.text: because it allows them a degree of independence, is less exploitative than many forms of paid employment, and is flexible enough to allow them to participate in other activities such as education and domestic tasks
allows them a degree of independence
is flexible enough to allow them to participate in other activities
such as education and domestic tasks

difficult_points: because 引导原因状语从句，解释儿童选择创业的原因。
it 指 entrepreneurship，后面并列说明创业的三个优点。
less exploitative than 是比较结构，说明创业相对较少剥削。
flexible enough to allow ... 表示灵活到足以让他们参加其他活动。

sentences.sentence: Street Business Partnerships
sentences.translation: 街头商业合作项目
difficult_points: 这是章节标题，概括下一部分介绍的项目类型。
Partnerships 表明这些商业项目依赖不同组织之间的合作。

sentences.sentence: S.K.I. has worked with partner organisations in Latin America, Africa and India to develop innovative opportunities for street children to earn income.
sentences.translation: S.K.I. 曾与拉丁美洲、非洲和印度的合作组织合作，为街头儿童发展创新性的创收机会。

structure.text: with partner organisations in Latin America, Africa and India
to develop innovative opportunities for street children to earn income
for street children to earn income

difficult_points: has worked 使用现在完成时，概括机构已有的合作经验。
to develop ... 是目的不定式，说明合作目标。
for street children to earn income 表示机会服务的对象和目的。

sentences.sentence: • The S.K.I. Bicycle Courier Service first started in the Sudan.
sentences.translation: • S.K.I. 自行车快递服务最早在苏丹启动。
difficult_points: 项目符号表明这是项目案例列表中的第一项。
first started 强调该服务最早启动的地点。
Bicycle Courier Service 指以自行车递送物品的快递服务。

sentences.sentence: Participants in this enterprise were supplied with bicycles, which they used to deliver parcels and messages, and which they were required to pay for gradually from their wages.
sentences.translation: 该企业项目的参与者获得了自行车，他们用这些自行车递送包裹和信息，并且需要逐步从工资中付款购买。

structure.text: which they used to deliver parcels and messages
which they were required to pay for gradually from their wages

difficult_points: were supplied with 是被动结构，表示参与者被提供自行车。
两个 which 从句都修饰 bicycles，分别说明用途和付款方式。
were required to pay for 表示参与者被要求逐步付款。
from their wages 说明付款来源是他们的工资。

sentences.sentence: A similar program was taken up in Bangalore, India.
sentences.translation: 一个类似项目后来在印度班加罗尔被采用。
difficult_points: was taken up 是被动语态，表示类似项目被采用或开展。
similar program 指前一句自行车快递项目的类似版本。
in Bangalore, India 说明项目推广到的地点。

sentences.sentence: • Another successful project, The Shoe Shine Collective, was a partnership program with the Y.W.C.A. in the Dominican Republic.
sentences.translation: • 另一个成功项目 The Shoe Shine Collective，是与多米尼加共和国 Y.W.C.A. 合作的项目。

structure.text: a partnership program with the Y.W.C.A. in the Dominican Republic

difficult_points: 项目符号引出第二个合作案例。
The Shoe Shine Collective 是插入同位语，说明项目名称。
with the Y.W.C.A. in the Dominican Republic 说明合作对象及所在地。

sentences.sentence: In this project, participants were lent money to purchase shoe shine boxes.
sentences.translation: 在这个项目中，参与者被借给资金，用于购买擦鞋箱。
difficult_points: were lent 是被动结构，表示参与者获得贷款。
to purchase ... 是目的不定式，说明贷款用途。
shoe shine boxes 指擦鞋服务所需的工具箱。

sentences.sentence: They were also given a safe place to store their equipment, and facilities for individual savings plans.
sentences.translation: 他们还获得了一个安全存放设备的地方，以及用于个人储蓄计划的设施。

structure.text: a safe place to store their equipment

difficult_points: They 指该擦鞋项目的参与者。
were also given 是被动结构，表示除贷款外还获得其他支持。
to store their equipment 修饰 a safe place，说明地点用途。
and facilities ... 与 a safe place 并列，都是项目提供的支持。

sentences.sentence: • The Youth Skills Enterprise initiative in Zambia is a joint program with the Red Cross Society and the Y.W.C.A.
sentences.translation: • 赞比亚 Youth Skills Enterprise initiative 是与红十字会和 Y.W.C.A. 合作开展的联合项目。

structure.text: The Youth Skills Enterprise initiative in Zambia
a joint program with the Red Cross Society and the Y.W.C.A.

difficult_points: 项目符号引出第三个案例。
in Zambia 修饰 initiative，说明项目地点。
a joint program with ... 表示该项目由多个组织共同参与。

sentences.sentence: Street youths are supported to start their own small business through business training, life skills training and access to credit.
sentences.translation: 街头青年通过商业培训、生活技能培训和获得信贷支持，来创办自己的小生意。

structure.text: to start their own small business
through business training, life skills training and access to credit

difficult_points: are supported 是被动语态，说明青年得到外部支持。
to start their own small business 说明支持的目标。
through 后列出三种支持方式：商业培训、生活技能培训和信贷机会。

sentences.sentence: Lessons learned
sentences.translation: 经验教训
difficult_points: 这是章节标题，提示接下来总结项目经验。
learned 是过去分词，修饰 Lessons，表示已经总结出来的经验。

sentences.sentence: The following lessons have emerged from the programs that S.K.I. and partner organisations have created.
sentences.translation: 以下经验来自 S.K.I. 及其合作组织创建的项目。

structure.text: from the programs that S.K.I. and partner organisations have created
that S.K.I. and partner organisations have created

difficult_points: have emerged from 表示经验是从项目实践中逐渐形成的。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 programs。
S.K.I. and partner organisations 是定语从句中的并列主语。

sentences.sentence: • Being an entrepreneur is not for everyone, nor for every street child.
sentences.translation: • 当企业家并不适合每个人，也不适合每一个街头儿童。
difficult_points: Being an entrepreneur 是动名词短语作主语。
not ... nor ... 表示双重否定范围：不适合所有人，也不适合所有街头儿童。
for 在这里表示“适合于”。

sentences.sentence: Ideally, potential participants will have been involved in the organisation's programs for at least six months, and trust and relationship building will have already been established.
sentences.translation: 理想情况下，潜在参与者应已经参与该组织项目至少六个月，并且信任和关系建设也已经建立起来。

structure.text: in the organisation's programs for at least six months

difficult_points: Ideally 表示理想条件，而非必须事实。
will have been involved 是将来完成被动/状态结构，强调在参加贷款项目前已有参与经历。
and 连接两个理想前提：长期参与和信任关系建立。
will have already been established 是将来完成被动语态，表示关系建设应已完成。

sentences.sentence: • The involvement of the participants has been essential to the development of relevant programs.
sentences.translation: • 参与者的参与对于相关项目的发展至关重要。

structure.text: essential to the development of relevant programs

difficult_points: The involvement of the participants 是名词短语作主语。
has been essential to 使用现在完成时，说明这种重要性在项目经验中已得到体现。
to the development of relevant programs 表示重要性的对象。

sentences.sentence: When children have had a major role in determining procedures, they are more likely to abide by and enforce them.
sentences.translation: 当儿童在确定程序方面发挥了重要作用时，他们更有可能遵守并执行这些程序。

structure.text: When children have had a major role in determining procedures
to abide by and enforce them

difficult_points: When 引导条件/时间状语从句，说明儿童参与程序制定的情况。
have had a major role 表示曾经或已经发挥重要作用。
are more likely to 表示可能性更高。
them 指代前面的 procedures。

sentences.sentence: • It is critical for all loans to be linked to training programs that include the development of basic business and life skills.
sentences.translation: • 所有贷款都必须与培训项目相联系，这些培训项目应包括基础商业和生活技能的发展，这一点至关重要。

structure.text: for all loans to be linked to training programs
that include the development of basic business and life skills
of basic business and life skills

difficult_points: It is critical 是形式主语结构，真正内容是后面的 for ... to ...。
to be linked to 是被动不定式，表示贷款应与培训项目连接。
that include ... 修饰 training programs。
basic business and life skills 是并列技能类别。

sentences.sentence: • There are tremendous advantages to involving parents or guardians in the program, where such relationships exist.
sentences.translation: • 在存在这类关系的情况下，让父母或监护人参与项目有巨大的优势。

structure.text: to involving parents or guardians in the program

difficult_points: There are 是存在句结构，强调存在巨大优势。
to involving ... 中 to 是介词，后接动名词 involving。
where such relationships exist 限定适用条件，即儿童与父母或监护人仍有关系。
parents or guardians 是并列对象。

sentences.sentence: Home visits allow staff the opportunity to know where the participants live, and to understand more about each individual's situation.
sentences.translation: 家访让工作人员有机会了解参与者住在哪里，并进一步了解每个人的处境。

structure.text: to know where the participants live
to understand more about each individual's situation

difficult_points: allow staff the opportunity 是“给某人机会”的结构。
to know 与 to understand 是并列不定式，说明机会的内容。
where the participants live 是 know 的宾语从句。
each individual's situation 强调对每个参与者具体情况的了解。

sentences.sentence: • Small loans are provided initially for purchasing fixed assets such as bicycles, shoe shine kits and basic building materials for a market stall.
sentences.translation: • 小额贷款最初用于购买固定资产，例如自行车、擦鞋工具包以及市场摊位所需的基础建筑材料。

structure.text: such as bicycles, shoe shine kits and basic building materials for a market stall

difficult_points: are provided 是被动语态，说明贷款由项目方提供。
initially 表示贷款发放的初始阶段用途。
for purchasing fixed assets 中 for 后接动名词，说明用途。
such as 后列举 fixed assets 的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: As the entrepreneurs gain experience, the enterprises can be gradually expanded and consideration can be given to increasing loan amounts.
sentences.translation: 随着创业者积累经验，这些企业可以逐步扩展，也可以考虑增加贷款金额。

structure.text: the enterprises can be gradually expanded

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示“随着”。
can be gradually expanded 是被动语态，说明企业可以逐步扩大。
consideration can be given to 是被动表达，意思是“可以考虑”。
increasing loan amounts 中 increasing 是动名词，作 to 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: The loan amounts in S.K.I. programs have generally ranged from US$90-$100.
sentences.translation: S.K.I. 项目的贷款金额通常在90到100美元之间。

structure.text: The loan amounts in S.K.I. programs

difficult_points: have generally ranged 使用现在完成时，概括项目的一般经验。
from US$90-$100 表示金额范围。
in S.K.I. programs 限定 loan amounts 的来源范围。

sentences.sentence: • All S.K.I. programs have charged interest on the loans, primarily to get the entrepreneurs used to the concept of paying interest on borrowed money.
sentences.translation: • 所有 S.K.I. 项目都对贷款收取利息，主要是为了让创业者习惯于为借来的钱支付利息这一概念。

structure.text: primarily to get the entrepreneurs used to the concept of paying interest on borrowed money
of paying interest on borrowed money

difficult_points: have charged interest 使用现在完成时，概括所有项目的一贯做法。
primarily to ... 表示收取利息的主要目的。
get the entrepreneurs used to 是“让某人习惯于”的结构。
paying interest on borrowed money 是 concept 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Generally the rates have been modest (lower than bank rates)
sentences.translation: 总体来说，利率一直较为适中（低于银行利率）。
difficult_points: Generally 表示概括通常情况。
the rates 指上一句贷款收取的利率。
modest 表示程度适中、不高。
括号中的 lower than bank rates 进一步说明 modest 的具体含义。

sentences.sentence: Conclusion
sentences.translation: 结论
difficult_points: 这是章节标题，提示文章进入总结部分。
标题为名词形式，没有主谓结构。

sentences.sentence: There is a need to recognise the importance of access to credit for impoverished young people seeking to fulfil economic needs.
sentences.translation: 有必要认识到，对于希望满足经济需求的贫困年轻人来说，获得信贷机会非常重要。

structure.text: to recognise the importance of access to credit
for impoverished young people seeking to fulfil economic needs

difficult_points: There is a need to 表示“有必要做……”。
the importance of access to credit 是 recognise 的宾语核心。
for impoverished young people 表示信贷机会重要性的受益对象。
seeking to fulfil economic needs 修饰 young people，说明他们的目标。

sentences.sentence: The provision of small loans to support the entrepreneurial dreams and ambitions of youth can be an effective means to help them change their lives.
sentences.translation: 提供小额贷款来支持年轻人的创业梦想和抱负，可以成为帮助他们改变生活的一种有效手段。

structure.text: The provision of small loans to support the entrepreneurial dreams and ambitions of youth
to support the entrepreneurial dreams and ambitions of youth
an effective means to help them change their lives
to help them change their lives

difficult_points: 主语是以 provision 为核心的长名词短语，不是 small loans。
to support ... 说明提供小额贷款的目的。
can be an effective means 表示可能是一种有效手段。
them 指前一句中的 impoverished young people 或 youth。

sentences.sentence: However, we believe that credit must be extended in association with other types of support that help participants develop critical skills as well as productive businesses.
sentences.translation: 然而，我们认为，信贷必须与其他类型的支持结合起来提供，这些支持能帮助参与者发展关键技能以及有生产力的企业。

structure.text: that credit must be extended in association with other types of support that help participants develop critical skills as well as productive businesses
in association with other types of support
that help participants develop critical skills as well as productive businesses

difficult_points: However 引出结论中的限制条件：信贷不能单独提供。
that 引导 believe 的宾语从句。
must be extended 是被动语态，表示信贷应被提供给参与者。
that help ... 修饰 other types of support，说明其他支持的作用。
